headline: Blackstone Builds On $8 Billion Core Private Equity Franchise With New Long-Hold Fund
summary: Blackstone (NYSE:BX) is in the process of raising money for its third private equity fund. The new fund, which will hold assets for longer than usual, will seek to invest in 8 to 10 companies, with cheque sizes totaling $800 million to $1 billion, Bloomberg reported. Sources familiar with the topic told Bloomberg that the firm has told investors that it will make a more formal fundraising pitch for its core private equity fund sometime this year. headline: Sony Music Publishing Lands Iconic Song Catalog In Major Blackstone Deal
summary: Sony Group Corporation (NYSE:SONY) shares traded higher Wednesday as investors reacted to a major music catalog acquisition by the company's publishing arm and continued buying into large-cap growth and entertainment stocks. The Nasdaq gained 0.90%, while the S&P 500 advanced 0.49%, supporting broader momentum across tech-linked names. headline: Blackstone’s May Portfolio Shuffle Reshapes Risk And Future Fee Potential
summary: In May 2026, Blackstone (NYSE:BX) announced the sale of Recognition Music Group to Sony Music and a lender-led restructuring of Medallia. The firm also agreed to acquire a majority stake in Greek e-commerce platform Skroutz and arranged a financing package with Broadcom tied to AI chip development. Additional moves included a large life sciences investment in Anagram Therapeutics and the launch of a real estate lending platform focused on affordable housing projects. Blackstone is putting...

headline: 2 Reasons We’re Fans of Blackstone (BX)
summary: Over the past six months, Blackstone’s stock price fell to $122.50. Shareholders have lost 15.1% of their capital, which is disappointing considering the S&P 500 has climbed by 7.7%. This may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.
